name: Jasper Lee Hau Jun
title: Full Stack Developer
tagline: I build fast, scalable, and beautiful web applications.
bio: I'm a full stack developer with a deep focus on NuxtJS and Laravel. I craft end-to-end digital products — from pixel-perfect frontends to robust, well-architected APIs.

specializations.title: Frontend Engineering
specializations.description: Building performant, accessible UIs with NuxtJS, Vue 3, and TypeScript. SSR, SSG, and everything in between.

specializations.title: Backend & API Design
specializations.description: Designing clean, RESTful APIs with Laravel. Solid database architecture, authentication, and third-party integrations.

specializations.title: Full Stack Delivery
specializations.description: End-to-end ownership of features — from database schema to deployed production system, with CI/CD pipelines.

specializations.title: UI/UX Sensibility
specializations.description: A keen eye for design systems, micro-interactions, and user experience that makes products feel polished and intentional.
